source_quote: Table 3 retention: Baseline Intervention=21, Control=20; 6-month Intervention=21, Control=19. One participant moved out of the area (98% retention at 6 months).

74 randomized (CBT=36, MET+CBT=38), 66 completed at least one session (8 pre-treatment dropouts). Per-arm dropout breakdown not reported in text. Completion of all 3 sessions: CBT 61%, MET+CBT 68%. Exact per-arm dropout counts not available.

112 randomized to 4 arms (2x2 factorial: disulfiram vs placebo x TSF vs standard). 5 never initiated, 26 dropped out, 81 completed. Completion rates: DIS/TSF 67% (n=29), DIS/NoTSF 82% (n=30), PLA/TSF 73% (n=27), PLA/NoTSF 81% (n=26). Collapsed by disulfiram factor: DIS arms 59 randomized ~43 completed (~16 dropped), PLA arms 53 randomized ~38 completed (~15 dropped). Chi-square=2.3, p=.51 for completion across arms.
